name: Amrize Ltd
business: Amrize Ltd is a building solutions company focused on the North American market, offering a broad range of advanced building solutions from foundation to rooftop. The company earns revenue from the sale of cement, aggregates, ready-mix concrete, asphalt, roofing systems and other building solutions. It serves more than 23,000 customers across the infrastructure, commercial, and residential construction markets in the United States and Canada.

exposures.sentence: Amrize provides cement, aggregates, ready-mix concrete materials, and advanced roofing and wall systems in the United States and Canada.

We operate in two reportable segments, offering a complete range of advanced solutions to support large-scale and complex construction projects from bridges to data centers in the areas of residential, commercial and infrastructure construction.
Our products are essential in commercial and residential new construction, public infrastructure construction projects and R&R activities.

For example, we have investments in Sublime Systems, a cement technology startup which plans to use renewable electricity and carbon-free raw materials for cement production, in the form of a convertible note and advance payments for future supplies and may participate in the startup's future potential rounds of capital raising to finance its manufacturing facility.
